# YUE Dance Studio (Xiang Yue Culture Arts)

> Professional Chinese dance, ballet, contemporary, and folk dance classes in Singapore. All levels welcome. Established 2018.

## Location
47 Beach Road, #02-04, Singapore 189683
Nearest MRT: Bugis, Nicoll Highway, City Hall

## Opening Hours
- Monday: 10 am – 9 pm
- Tuesday: 7:30 – 9 pm
- Wednesday: 10 am – 9 pm
- Thursday: 10 am – 9 pm
- Friday: 4:30 – 9 pm
- Saturday: 11 am – 9 pm
- Sunday: 2 – 6 pm

## Courses Offered
- Contemporary Dance (Instructor: Daniel Deng Yu)
- Adult Ballet (Instructor: Shen Zhihua)
- Chinese Dance (Instructors: Daniel Deng Yu, Chang Hsiao-Min)
- Folk Dance (Instructor: Bai Ying Wen)
- Chinese Classical Dance (Instructor: Angel Peng)

## Fees & Enrollment
- Drop-in / trial class: $38 per 1.5-hour session
- Rolling enrollment — new students can join at any time
- Maximum 16 students per class
- Age range: 18–70 years old

- Email: xiangyue.culturearts@gmail.com
